sources.name: OpenOCD target inventory
sources.notes: Scans OpenOCD target configuration names and reports which have a matching local SVD.

sources.name: Texas Instruments C2000/MSPM0
sources.notes: Delegates register extraction to the existing TI generator. CCS targetdb or an offline CMSIS-Pack is required.

sources.name: Microchip dsPIC/PIC
sources.notes: Catalogs generated dsPIC SVDs and validates them with the universal validator.

sources.name: Generic CMSIS-Pack import
sources.notes: Imports any .svd members from a local .pack archive into a vendor output directory.
